title: Customer Credits
noWalletBalance: No wallet balance is available for this customer.
walletBalanceExceeded: Wallet amount exceeds the available balance of {amount}.
applied: Adjust the amount below with Exact, Fill remaining, or the keypad.
amountEditHint: Tap the amount field to edit this credit with the keypad.
empty: No customer credits are available for this customer.
referenceSelectionHint: This credit needs a specific source selection before it can be applied.
creditNotePickerEmpty: No open credit notes are available for this customer.
creditNoteSelectHint: Tap to choose a credit note
creditNoteRequired: Select a credit note before applying this payment leg.
storedValueBalanceExceeded: {method} amount exceeds the available balance of {amount}.
